title: APM: Octo Demo Attack Timeline
description: Chronological attack-lab events from the Octo APM demo, keyed by Attack ID, Run ID, Request ID, Trace ID, and Span ID so operators can pivot from security logs into APM spans.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' != null | sort Time | fields Time, 'Attack ID', 'Run ID', 'Attack Stage', 'Security Severity', 'MITRE Technique ID', 'Service Name', 'Workflow Step', 'Request ID', 'Trace ID', 'Span ID', 'Instance OCID', 'Payment Redirect URL', msg

ask_ai_prompts: Walk the Octo attack-lab timeline by Attack ID and identify the first compromised VM.
Correlate each attack stage with the Trace ID and Span ID shown in the timeline.
